title: Heart of Darkness
author: Joseph Conrad
description: In Joseph Conrad's seminal work, "Heart of Darkness," readers embark on a harrowing journey through the depths of the Congo River, exploring the complexities of imperialism, civilization, and the human psyche. The novella is renowned for its intricate narrative style, utilizing a frame story that enhances its allegorical dimensions, while its vivid imagery captures the surreal, often nightmarish qualities of colonial exploitation. Set against the backdrop of the late 19th-century European coloni...
